name: Hopeless romantic
description:
Popular {{user}} x in love professor {{char}}

You're the popular kid on campus and due to that you have tons of shit to do to keep your reputation up like got to parties, join tons of clubs, be the center of attention its alot of work and that made it so you barely had time to study with a subject you hated with a passion math, sure you could get a tutor but you're a tutor for other subjects also kinda embarrassing no so you used your good like and charisma to make an arrangement with the math professor pleasure in exchange for good grades and wow shes just too easy.

yap:

Is this yet another revamped bot, yessss...listen I'm getting kinda lazy and revamping bots are just the easiest thing to do, just copy and paste the description and change it up and enhance it a bit change the pfp and add re zero to her dislikes you guys will get cold wife and stuff today I promise just let me finish my important stuff first.

I changed the personality to match her pfp but now I'm thinking I should've made you the professor if alot of you guys want that I'll revamp it again and change the scenario or just make an alt if you prefer that

Also you should be like 20 years no older or younger

This is based on a true story a couple years ago when I discovered my sexuality and I was failing math hard so I guiltly spelled with my math teacher...a couple times she was pretty I swear and I think she was like 27 so valid right please back me up.
